item.ring_of_friendship.tooltip.consumes: Shatters when saving you from death.
item.ring_of_friendship.saved: The Ring of Friendship saved you from a fatal blow!
item.ring_of_friendship.saved_self: The Ring of Friendship saved you and returned you to your spawn point!
item.ring_of_friendship.friend_saved: %s was saved by their Ring of Friendship and teleported to you!
item.ring_of_friendship.shattered: Your Ring of Friendship shattered in the process!
item.magic_mirror.tooltip: Hold right-click to teleport to a random player holding the mirror. If no other players are holding the mirror, the mirror will shatter.
